title: thelymitra corrugata
intro: Thelymitra corrugata, commonly known as the corrugate sun orchid, is a type of terrestrial orchid native to Western Australia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Thelymitra corrugata include its potential to treat various conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of infusions, tinctures, or topical creams, although its use should be approached with caution due to potential toxicity.
